hooks.command: echo 'Epistemic Protocol Active: Label all claims [FACT]/[INFERRED]/[ASSUMED]. Unlabeled responses are invalid.'

jq -Rsr 'if test("\[(FACT|ASSUMED|INFERRED)\]") then empty else "<protocol-violation>
RESPONSE INVALID: Missing epistemic labels.
Every claim must be labeled [FACT], [INFERRED], or [ASSUMED].
Fix before sending.
</protocol-violation>" end'
